title: macrozamia tridentata var. corallipes
intro: Macrozamia tridentata var. corallipes, also known as the Queensland cycad, is a species of cycad native to the eastern coast of Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and has been used to treat conditions such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the Queensland cycad can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
